title: Identifying a Rei scene
wikitext:
[]: Identifying a Rei scene             Quote Post by PenPen77 » Wed Aug 04, 2021 4:01 pm I was hoping someone could help me with a scene I swore I saw at an anime convention (friend saw it too that I was with) in mid to late 90s that has always stuck with me but never could identify. What I remember was a bunch of Rei's being transported on a conveyor belt. I'm not talking about that picture of the lineup of Rei's either as I don't think they were spaced that close together. This might have been some promotional footage but I can't seem to find it on the internet and now that I'm getting closure with 3.0 + 1.0 soon, I wanted to see if I could resolve this mystery as well. Thanks!

[]: Re: Identifying a Rei scene             Quote Post by orcot » Tue Aug 17, 2021 1:10 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2tJQ6AweIf4 24 serconds in?

What I remember was a bunch of Rei's being transported on a conveyor belt. I'm not talking about that picture of the lineup of Rei's either as I don't think they were spaced that close together.
